scripts.build: npm run build:index && npm run build:worker
scripts.build:index: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=__plugin --target=es2020 --outfile=./dist/index.js --footer:js="var discoverTools=__plugin.discoverTools;var execute=__plugin.execute;var matchEvent=__plugin.matchEvent;var formatLabel=__plugin.formatLabel;var buildConfig=__plugin.buildConfig;var parseNotification=__plugin.parseNotification;"
